description: Minor URI in a young adult, no red flags, low-grade fever.

patient.name: Jenny W., 28F
patient.chief_complaint: Runny nose, mild sore throat, productive cough for 3 days, low-grade fever to 37.8 yesterday. Eating and drinking normally. Denies shortness of breath.

rubric_notes: Normal vitals (temp 37.4 within normal range, others normal). Symptom picture clearly viral URI. No red flags. Per RUBRIC Rule 5: discharge with symptomatic management instructions = ESI 5. ESI 4 if a single resource (rapid strep test) is performed. Tests overtriage tendency on common low-acuity presentations.
